mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_TYPE_CD AS reportTypeCd, REPORT_TYPE_NM AS reportTypeNm FROM REVIEW_REPORT_TYPE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW_REPORT ( REVIEW_REPORT_NO, REPORTER_MEMBER_NO, CONTENT_REVIEW_NO, REPORT_TYPE_CD, REPORT_COMMENT ) VALUES ( REVIEW_REPORT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{reporterMemberNo}, #{contentReviewNo}, #{reportTypeCd}, #{reportComment, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
